title: Return Totem
description: Totem of Return lets you automatically respawn at your bed with all your items after death. It saves your gear and progress, making survival easier and fair. Perfect for singleplayer and multiplayer!
body:
Description
Tired of losing all your hard-earned gear and progress after dying? The Totem of Return mod is here to save the day!

This mod introduces a unique and powerful artifact — the Totem of Return — designed to rescue you from the frustration of death by instantly reviving you at your bed spawn point with all your items intact.


Support & Feedback
Have questions, suggestions, or found a bug? Leave a comment on the mod page.

Thank you for checking out the Return Totem! Good luck and happy surviving!
